title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates AI models and applications but faces a power infrastructure disadvantage relative to China. China's centralized political structure enables faster deployment of ultra-high-voltage transmission and data center buildout, while US fragmentation across jurisdictions creates slower grid integration. The video argues that unless efficiency gains close the gap, this power infrastructure gap will impact US AI competitiveness.
